texts.label: text
texts.orig: I  am very happy to announce that Women's Polytechnic, Hapania  is  bringing  out  the  2 Newsletter, showcasing all the activities performed during April-June 2019. ourselves to impart best quality education through knowledge and skill enhancement of the aspiring engineers.
